business.type_label: 3D animation plugin software vendor (MochaBlend, 2D-to-3D tracking-data plugins for C4D/Blender/Maya)

engine.ladder_reasoning: Visitor is evaluating a THING — a suite of plugins — via a feature/version comparison table and product intro pages; not trusting a person, browsing a portfolio, or checking a place.

goal.one_action: get the visitor to buy the MochaBlend plugin (e-store) or inquire via contact form

structure.archetype_note: Legacy WordPress software-vendor site with many jobs (product docs, e-store, image gallery, Q&A/forum, contact) — not a single-conversion landing page; hence out of ICP.

mapped.observed_as: MochaBlend is a suite of plugins that allows you to import mocha's 2D tracking-data into 3D animation programs.

unmapped.why_no_fit: A user-generated discussion forum is a standing community property, not any canonical marketing section

proposed_new.name: community-forum
proposed_new.evidence: Dedicated FORUM nav item plus a CM Answers Q&A page — a user-generated discussion/community board, distinct from blog (owned posts) and faq (static section).

confidence.why: fetch_quality is 'partial'; real body content on store/gallery/answers/product pages is obscured/interspersed with heavy injected spam and not deeply parsed, and the site is a defunct/compromised legacy WordPress install, so section and goal signals are weak.

gap_findings: Site has MULTIPLE conversion jobs (buy plugin via e-store, ask via contact form, browse gallery, participate in forum) — the taxonomy assumes one conversion action; this is a legacy multi-purpose product site, not a single-action landing page (in_icp:false).
A user-generated community FORUM / Q&A board is not expressible in the current section list or capability vocab (proposed community-forum).
